room.caption: [G3-2A] Sweet death from above.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(15)
if global.gameProgress=1190 global.gameProgress=1200
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh6MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA) blackTop=instance_create(0,0,oG2_BlackTop)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(302) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
